caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped collared shirt and black over-ear headphones, is seen in a home or office setting. She is positioned in front of a pale wall and a light-colored curtain with a blue edge. In the first frame, she has a skeptical or questioning expression with narrowed eyes and a slight frown. As the sequence progresses, her expression shifts; she begins to smile and open her mouth as if speaking. By the final frames, she maintains an engaged facial expression, speaking directly toward the camera with her mouth open. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom left corner of each frame. The background remains static throughout the clip, with a plain wall and a small ledge visible behind her.
